js.description: The list of JS files to inject

scriptMetadata.description: An opaque user script metadata value

allFrames.description: If allFrames is true, implies that the JavaScript should be injected into all frames of current page. By default, it's false and is only injected into the top frame.

matchAboutBlank.description: If matchAboutBlank is true, then the code is also injected in about:blank and about:srcdoc frames if your extension has access to its parent document. Code cannot be inserted in top-level about:-frames. By default it is false.

runAt.description: The soonest that the JavaScript will be injected into the tab. Defaults to "document_idle".

cookieStoreId.description: limit the set of matched tabs to those that belong to the given cookie store id

types.description: An object that represents a user script registered programmatically

id.description: The ID of the user script specified in the API call. This property must not start with a '_' as it's reserved as a prefix for generated script IDs.

allFrames.description: If allFrames is true, implies that the JavaScript should be injected into all frames of current page. By default, it's false and is only injected into the top frame.

js.description: The list of ScriptSource objects defining sources of scripts to be injected into matching pages.

matches.description: At least one of matches or includeGlobs should be non-empty. The script runs in documents whose URL match either pattern.

includeGlobs.description: At least one of matches or includeGlobs should be non-empty. The script runs in documents whose URL match either pattern.

runAt.description: The soonest that the JavaScript will be injected into the tab. Defaults to "document_idle".

world.description: The JavaScript script for a script to execute within. Defaults to "USER_SCRIPT".

worldId.description: If specified, specifies a specific user script world ID to execute in. Only valid if `world` is omitted or is `USER_SCRIPT`. If `worldId` is omitted, the script will execute in the default user script world (""). Values with leading underscores (`_`) are reserved. The maximum length is 256.

types.description: The JavaScript world for a script to execute within. USER_SCRIPT is the default execution environment of user scripts, MAIN is the web page's execution environment.
Optional filter to use with getScripts() and unregister().
Object with file xor code property. Equivalent to the ExtensionFileOrCode, except the file remains a relative URL.

file.description: The path of the JavaScript file to inject relative to the extension's root directory.

types.description: The configuration of a USER_SCRIPT world.

worldId.description: The identifier of the world. Values with leading underscores (`_`) are reserved. The maximum length is 256. Defaults to the default USER_SCRIPT world ("").

csp.description: The world's Content Security Policy. Defaults to the CSP of regular content scripts, which prohibits dynamic code execution such as eval.

messaging.description: Whether the runtime.sendMessage and runtime.connect methods are exposed. Defaults to not exposing these messaging APIs.

types.description: Details of a user script injection

injectImmediately.description: Whether the injection should be triggered in the target as soon as possible. Note that this is not a guarantee that injection will occur prior to page load, as the page may have already loaded by the time the script reaches the target.

js.description: The list of ScriptSource objects defining sources of scripts to be injected into matching pages.

target.description: Details specifying the target into which to inject the script.

world.description: The JavaScript "world" to run the script in. The default is `USER_SCRIPT`.

worldId.description: A specific user script world ID to execute in. Only valid if `world` is omitted or is `USER_SCRIPT`. If `worldId` is omitted, the default value is an empty string ("") and the script will execute in the default world.

types.description: Details specifying the target into which to inject the script.

allFrames.description: Whether the script should inject into all frames within the tab. Defaults to false. This must not be true if `frameIds` is specified.

documentIds.description: The IDs of specific documentIds to inject into. This must not be set if frameIds is set.

frameIds.description: The IDs of specific frames to inject into.

tabId.description: The ID of the tab into which to inject.

types.description: Result of a user script injection.

documentId.description: Document ID associated with the injection.

frameId.description: Frame ID associated with the injection.

result.description: Result of the script injection if any. This is mutually exclusive with error.

error.description: Error message if any. This is mutually exclusive with result. The value is typically an (Error) object with a message property, but could be any value (including primitives and undefined) if the user script threw or rejected with such a value.

functions.name: register
functions.description: Register a user script programmatically given its $(ref:userScripts.UserScriptOptions), and resolves to an object with the unregister() function

parameters.name: legacyRegisteredUserScript
parameters.description: An object that represents a user script registered programmatically

unregister.description: Unregister a user script registered programmatically

functions.name: register
functions.description: Registers one or more user scripts for this extension.

parameters.name: scripts
parameters.description: List of user scripts to be registered.

functions.name: update
functions.description: Updates one or more user scripts for this extension.

parameters.name: scripts
parameters.description: List of user scripts to be updated.

functions.name: unregister
functions.description: Unregisters all dynamically-registered user scripts for this extension.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: If specified, this method unregisters only the user scripts that match it.

functions.name: getScripts
functions.description: Returns all dynamically-registered user scripts for this extension.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: If specified, this method returns only the user scripts that match it.

functions.name: configureWorld
functions.description: Configures the environment for scripts running in a USER_SCRIPT world.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: The desired configuration for a USER_SCRIPT world.

functions.name: resetWorldConfiguration
functions.description: Resets the configuration for a given world. That world will fall back to the default world's configuration.

parameters.name: worldId
parameters.description: The ID of the USER_SCRIPT world to reset. If omitted or empty, resets the default world's configuration.

functions.name: getWorldConfigurations
functions.description: Returns all registered USER_SCRIPT world configurations.

functions.name: execute
functions.description: Executes one or more ephemeral user scripts into a specific tab.

parameters.name: injection
parameters.description: The details of the user script which to inject.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Invoked upon completion of the injection. The resulting array contains the result of execution for each frame where the injection succeeded.
